title: citrus × aurantium var. mellarosa
intro: Citrus × aurantium var. mellarosa, also known as bitter orange, is a variety of the bitter orange tree, a hybrid of the sour orange (Citrus × aurantium) and the sweet orange (Citrus sinensis). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural stimulant, diuretic, and antispasmodic, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Citrus × aurantium var. mellarosa include aiding in weight loss, reducing inflammation, and improving digestion, among others. The herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare, and as a flavoring agent in food and beverages.
